product_overview: A Next.js 14 marketing site for Forge: hero, features (#features), how-it-works (#how-it-works), setup guide (#setup), model examples (#model-config), and footer. Content is documentation-style. Only GitHub links are the primary external handoff; other UI is validated by scrolling or hash navigation and by visibility—not by clicking setup or provider toggles in automated tests.

mandatory_external_click: GitHub repository anchors only when a click is required
visibility_only_no_tab_or_toggle_clicks: Setup mode switcher (Docker / Build from source)
test_automation_policy.restricted_environments: If github.com or partner sites do not load in the test browser, pass GitHub tests when href, target=_blank, and rel include noopener and noreferrer on the landing origin.

core_goals: Orient visitors and link to the GitHub repository safely
Show setup and model configuration as readable, copy-friendly content
Explain the product flow via on-page sections discoverable by scrolling or hashes

features.name: Hero and primary navigation
features.description: Hero messaging; GitHub links with safe external attributes; Get Started links to #setup.
user_flows: Open /#setup or scroll -> Setup section visible
Inspect or use GitHub link -> href/target/rel correct on landing DOM

features.name: Features
user_flows: Open /#features or scroll -> Feature cards visible

features.name: Setup guide
features.description: Docker-first copy with Build from source option; toggles exist for humans, tests assert visibility only.
user_flows: Scroll to #setup -> Steps and code blocks visible -> Mode labels visible

features.name: Model provider examples
features.description: Static .env examples; tests assert section and default snippet visibility without clicking tabs.
user_flows: Scroll to #model-config -> Provider names and example block visible

features.name: How it works
features.description: Illustrative terminal and eight steps at #how-it-works.
user_flows: Open /#how-it-works or scroll -> Steps and terminal region visible

features.name: Footer
features.description: Branding and external links with safe new-tab attributes.
user_flows: Scroll to footer -> Branding visible -> External links have target _blank and rel noopener noreferrer

routes.description: Single-page landing with hash sections: features, how-it-works, setup, model-config

known_limitations.issue: Cloud test browsers may not reach external sites
known_limitations.impact: Validate link markup on localhost; do not require remote page load
